Title: Senior Student
Description: I want to know how the sausage is made, from first principles.

Title: Co-Founder
Description: A passion project with two friends, improveme.io is a webapp to do ad-hoc, project-based peer feedback. At one point we even had more than zero (~300) users! :) It started as a great opportunity to learn the T3 stack. Now it is a great project to experiment with agentic workflows and integrating AI to an already established product.

Title: Senior Frontend Developer
Description: I was part of the “Foundations” team. Built features around search, user management and data insights. Introduced a new design system and component library. Lead modularization effort on the front-end

Title: Full-Stack Engineer
Description: As a solo dev I was responsible for the “Replay App”, a video viewing and annotating platform. Built a custom video player with live streaming, offline playback, and an interactive annotation tool. Rearchitected and rebuilt existing parts of the platform

Title: Frontend Developer
Description: Worked on decoupling the “admin” interface from a PHP monolith. I was the product owner responsible for the day-to-day operation and rituals of a cross-functional team of 6.

Title: Frontend Developer
Description: Worked mostly on the frontend and a bit on the backend of a factoring service for an early-stage fintech startup. Dabbled in being the product owner for a small team of 3.

Title: Full-Stack Engineer
Description: I was part of the “Chain Bridge” team. Worked on integration, automation, and tooling for all of Prezi’s go-to-market teams. Worked on licensing and payment systems.

Title: Support Specialist
Description: "Hi, this is Michael from Prezi, how can I help you?" :) I was doing night shift billing, then T2 tech support. During the day, I was learning how to code.
